rollback_scope: revert AO2 merge commit bbbf9313e3e1b05c16ec5f6d16e07e75b35c4c7d through a reviewed PR
remove node-specific Atlas evidence if the node is reopened
preserve explicit approval and provider-free defaults
rollback_command: Prepare a reviewed AO2 revert PR for the node merge and regenerate the Atlas readback; do not mutate main directly.
data_loss_risk: none; replay verification becomes stricter and all evidence is digest-addressed
